positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of celestial flora and fauna, featuring blooming cosmic lotus flowers intertwining with crescent moons and geometric constellations. The main elements should be arranged in a balanced, circular, mandala-like composition, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue palette contrasted with luminous gold and ethereal lavender highlights. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau and modern abstract linework, perfectly isolated on a solid, breathable background. Intricate detail, high contrast, vector-quality appearance, suitable for textile printing.
negative: blurry, grainy, photorealism, noise, text, logo, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, artifacts, extra limbs, ugly, low contrast, grayscale, gradient, messy, collage
